headline: AI for Call Centers: Speech Analytics, Real-Time Agent Assist, and Sentiment Detection
description: AI is the silent coach on every customer service call -- transcribing conversations in real-time, suggesting the best responses, detecting customer frustration, and scoring quality across every interaction. From Cresta to Gong, AI transforms call centers from cost centers into intelligence hubs.

citation.name: AI-Powered Contact Center Transformation: Real-Time Agent Assist, Speech Analytics, and Quality Management (2024-2025 Survey)
Deep Learning for Conversational Speech Analytics: Sentiment, Emotion, and Intent Detection in Contact Centers
